432 NEED_WNT_INTRPTR_CD NEED_WNT_INTRPTR_CD Does the patient need or want an interpreter CHAR 1 This column contains information on whether the patient needs an interpreter to communicate with a doctor or health care staff. 0 = No
1 = Yes
9 = Unable to Determine
433 TRNSPRTN_MDCL_ADMSN_CD TRNSPRTN_MDCL_ADMSN_CD Transportation: Yes, medical (Adm) CHAR 1 This column documents whether lack of transportation has kept the patient from attending medical appointments at the time of
